objective: advise on which specific parts of the proposal require consultation with specific team members and which can be left out

context.workflow_strategy_for_understanding_dire: the SMEs will be consulted based on your guidance, and asked to provide advice to implementation engineers if material. Then an implementation manager will be consulted with the SME guidance and will either stage a single workflow, or parallel workflows, understanding they will be required to execute a final workflow that is a combination of the staged and parallel workflows, and will be responsible for ensuring the final workflow is executed correctly.

instructions.do_not: needlessly suggest involving more people than necessary

output_format.format: comparative list of team members to consult vs. not consult

message: considering the consultation needs for the current proposal conversation, which team members should be consulted and which can be left out? provide a comparative list of team members to consult vs. not consult, along with brief justifications for each recommendation.
